summary: Bulk Message ('Message All') feature fully tested — backend and frontend. All 10 test scenarios passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Bulk route /messages/bulk is correctly placed BEFORE /messages/{player_user_id} in coach_messaging.py — no routing conflict
BulkMessageModal correctly filters committed players client-side before showing eligible count
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Message feature fully implemented and working. Coach has 1 player in Watch List (Daniel Orodje). Backend: POST /api/coach/messages/bulk returns {sent, skipped, skipped_names, list_name}. Frontend: message-all-btn-{listName} on non-Committed columns with >=1 player; BulkMessageModal with bulk-msg-body-textarea, bulk-msg-send-btn, bulk-msg-cancel-btn, bulk-msg-done-btn all functional.

test_results_detail.backend_1: PASS: POST /api/coach/messages/bulk with Watch List returns {sent:1, skipped:0, list_name:'Watch List'}

test_results_detail.frontend_8: PASS: Sending message shows success state with bulk-msg-done-btn
